ValidationRule.description: For 'Other' Payable, Lease should belong to the Lessee
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND (NOT( ISBLANK( leaseworks__Lease__c )), AND(ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Payable_Type__c, 'Other'), AND(PRIORVALUE(leaseworks__Lease__c)!= leaseworks__Lease__c , leaseworks__Lease__r.leaseworks__Lessee_New__c != leaseworks__Lessee_New__c) ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please select a lease associated with the lessee
